Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IConcreteEventActionTable

All Superinterfaces:
IEventActionTable, IPOGState, IState
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConcreteEventActionTable
public interface IConcreteEventActionTable extends IEventActionTable
Common protocol for accessing the actions of the concrete event. There is always exacly one concrete event. In case of a split refinement each split event is treated separately.
Since:
1.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final IStateType<IConcreteEventActionTable>
    STATE_TYPE
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BecomesEqualTo
    getDeltaPrime()
    Returns a substitution to rename all variables in the frame of the actions of the event from unprimed to primed, or null if there are no variables to be renamed.
    BecomesEqualTo
    getXiUnprime()
    Returns a substitution to rename all variables not in the frame of the actions of the event from primed to unprimed, or null if there are no variables to be renamed.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.pog.state.IEventActionTable

    containsAssignedVariable, getActions, getAssignedVariables, getAssignments, getDetActions, getDetAssignments, getNondetActions, getNondetAssignments, getNondetPredicates, getPrimedDetAssignments

    getStateType, isImmutable, makeImmutable

    • getXiUnprime

      BecomesEqualTo getXiUnprime()
      Returns a substitution to rename all variables not in the frame of the actions of the event from primed to unprimed, or null if there are no variables to be renamed.

      Returns a substitution to rename all variables in the frame of the actions of the event from unprimed to primed, or null if there are no variables to be renamed.

      a substitution to rename all variables in the frame of the actions of the event from unprimed to primed, or null if there are no variables to be renamed
